title: How Building a Crypto Store on GitHub Pages Works and How to Set It Up Today
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: From zero to live crypto store in one afternoon. GitHub Pages hosting, Core Shop Engine, Web3 Wallet Connect, NOWPayments integration.

content.text: If you're a digital creator in a country like Nigeria, Ghana, or Pakistan, you know how hard it can be to get paid for your work. Platforms like PayPal, Stripe, and Gumroad are often restricted, leaving you without a reliable way to sell your digital products. But what if you could build a crypto store on GitHub Pages, accepting payments in Bitcoin, Ethereum, and other cryptocurrencies, without needing a payment processor account? This guide will show you how to set up a digital store that works, even when everything else fails.
Why This Method Works When Everything Else Fails

The reason this method works is that it uses a decentralized payment system, allowing you to accept crypto payments without needing a traditional payment processor. This means you can sell your digital products to anyone, anywhere in the world, without worrying about restrictions or middlemen taking a cut. With the Core Shop Engine, you can automate delivery and payment verification, making it easy to run your store without hassle.
What You Need Before You Start

Before you start building your crypto store, you'll need a few things. First, you'll need a GitHub account and a basic understanding of how GitHub Pages works. You'll also need to choose a payment gateway that supports crypto payments, such as NOWPayments. Finally, you'll need to decide which digital products you want to sell and how you'll deliver them to your customers. With these basics in place, you can start building your store.
Setting Up Your Payment and Delivery Pipeline

To set up your payment and delivery pipeline, you'll need to integrate your payment gateway with your store. This involves adding a few lines of code to your GitHub Pages site, which will allow you to accept crypto payments and automate delivery of your digital products. The Core Shop Engine makes this process easy, with a simple and intuitive interface that guides you through the process. With the Web3 Wallet Connect, you can also add multi-chain QR codes and live price feeds to your site.
Build a crypto store that works, even when everything else fails.
Going Live and Making Your First Sale

Once you've set up your payment and delivery pipeline, you're ready to go live and make your first sale. This involves deploying your GitHub Pages site and testing your payment gateway to make sure everything is working smoothly. With the Admin Dashboard, you can track your sales and orders in real-time, making it easy to manage your store and respond to customer inquiries. When you make your first sale, you'll know that your store is working and that you can start earning money from your digital products.
Scaling Once the System Is Running

As your store grows and you start to make more sales, you'll need to think about scaling your operation. This involves optimizing your site for performance, adding new products and payment options, and streamlining your customer support process. With the Full Stack Bundle, you'll have everything you need to scale your store, including priority updates, Discord support, and a deployment guide. By following these steps, you can build a successful crypto store that generates revenue and helps you achieve your goals.
How do I build a digital store that accepts crypto payments?

The cheapest way to set up a digital product store is to use a decentralized payment system and host your site on GitHub Pages. This approach eliminates the need for traditional payment processors and hosting services, saving you money and giving you more control over your store. With the Core Shop Engine and NOWPayments, you can accept crypto payments and automate delivery of your digital products, all for a one-time payment of $79.99.
Accept crypto payments without needing a traditional payment processor.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're looking for a comprehensive solution to set up your digital store, consider the Full Stack Bundle, which includes everything you need to get started, including the Core Shop Engine, Web3 Wallet Connect, and Admin Dashboard. You can also check out the Unchained Commerce shop at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html to see how it works in practice. By following this guide and using the right tools, you can build a successful crypto store that generates revenue and helps you achieve your goals.
Your Action Checklist

To get started, first sign up for a GitHub account and create a new repository for your store. Next, choose a payment gateway that supports crypto payments, such as NOWPayments, and integrate it with your store using the Core Shop Engine. Then, add your digital products and set up your delivery pipeline using the Web3 Wallet Connect. Finally, deploy your site and test your payment gateway to make sure everything is working smoothly. With these steps, you can build a crypto store that accepts payments in Bitcoin, Ethereum, and other cryptocurrencies, and start earning money from your digital products.
Automate delivery and payment verification with the Core Shop Engine.
